concerns.text: FR-008 requires validating that source data represents raw developer time, not pre-calculated CO₂. T006 only mentions loading hardcoded values without a verification step to ensure these values correspond to raw time data from the 2025 paper, leaving FR-008 unimplemented.

FR-009 mandates a sensitivity analysis to assess stability of the comparison. T026/T027 generate a CSV but lack a task to integrate these results into the final report (FR-007) or compare stability against the primary result, leaving the requirement partially unfulfilled.

SC-005 requires the final report to include the specific statistical test selected and Shapiro-Wilk p-value as evidence of rigor. T037 (Report Generation) does not explicitly mandate including these specific values in output/report.md, risking non-compliance with SC-005.

The Plan's Verified Fallback Protocol allows switching to HumanEval/MBPP if CodeXGLUE is unavailable. T005 mentions this switch but lacks a task to define the mapping logic required to align HumanEval/MBPP prompts with the specific human baseline time estimates (tied to CodeXGLUE), making the fallback technically impossible without additional design.
